definition: process analyser that uses flame ionisation to measure the concentration of one or more components in a gas phase by means of the resulting ionisation current

definition_ml.en: process analyser that uses flame ionisation to measure the concentration of one or more components in a gas phase by means of the resulting ionisation current
definition_ml.de: Prozessanalysengerät, das die Flammenionisation nutzt, um die Konzentration einer oder mehrerer Komponenten in der Gasphase mit Hilfe des resultierenden Ionisationsstroms zu messen

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
